title: STAR - Enigma Hybrid Semantic Search API
content:
Project: Enigma Hybrid Semantic Search API for Business Discovery

Situation:
- Teams needed natural-language business discovery instead of rigid query-only workflows.
- Pure structured search missed fuzzy semantic intent, while pure semantic search lacked hard business constraints.

Task:
- Deliver a practical retrieval system combining constraint-based filtering with semantic relevance.

Action:
- Built a hybrid design using structured filter extraction, vector retrieval, and reranking.
- Parsed user intent into hard constraints and semantic query components.
- Combined SQL-style filtering with vector similarity retrieval for precision and breadth.
- Added reranking to improve final result relevance for user-facing responses.

Result:
- Source-reported higher usability and faster business discovery workflows for internal teams.
- Demonstrated a scalable retrieval pattern for operational query systems.
